action.description: Read Third Time in Full – ADOPTED - 36-34-0AYES – Alfieri, Bingham, Cannon, Cheatum, Cornilles, Crane(12), Crane(13), Dygert, Ehlers, Erickson, Fuhriman, Garner, Hall(Stone), Handy, Hill, Holtzclaw, Manwaring, McCann, Mickelsen, Miller, Mitchell, Monks, Palmer, Petzke, Pickett, Pohanka, Redman, Shepherd, Shirts, Skaug, Tanner(14), Vander Woude, Veile, Weber, Wheeler, Mr. SpeakerNAYS – Barbieri, Beiswenger, Berch, Boyle, Bruce, Burgoyne, Cayler, Church, Egbert, Ehardt, Furniss, Galaviz, Gannon, Green, Harris, Hawkins, Haws, Healey, Hostetler, Leavitt, Marmon, Mathias, Mendive, Nelsen, Price, Rasor, Raybould, Raymond, Rubel, Sauter, Scott, Tanner(13), Thompson, WisniewskiAbsent – NoneFloor Sponsors - Shirts & Tanner(14)Title apvd - to Senate
